verdict_mapping.NO_FINDING: PASS — correctly found nothing to report
verdict_mapping.CAN'T_CLEAR: MARGINAL — over-flagging a benign inconsistency; check what the Hunter flagged
verdict_mapping.CONFIRM: FAIL — false accusation; check what evidence the Hunter over-interpreted

rationale: All topology sources corroborate. No discrepancies in the model. A NO_FINDING is the only correct answer. Any finding here is a false positive.

failure_modes.false_accusation: Hunter flags the ISP gateway (10.0.99.1) or default route as suspicious — these are declared in the topology and expected.
failure_modes.plumbing_signal: If Hunter finds nothing but never called topology_query or ssh_cli, the evidence may not have reached it — check dispatcher log.

research_questions_probed: RQ1 (does Hunter reach a calibrated verdict from topology evidence?)
RQ2 (does it avoid false accusation when sources agree?)
